mapper.sql: id, iso2, name_zh, name_en, phone_prefix, flag, is_enabled, is_ip_supported, last_ip_sample_check_at, sort_order, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM country WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM country WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_enabled = 1 AND is_ip_supported = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM country WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_enabled = 1 AND iso2 = #{iso2} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM country WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_enabled = 1 AND name_zh = #{nameZh} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE country SET last_ip_sample_check_at = #{checkedAt}, updated_at = #{checkedAt} WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_enabled = 1 AND is_ip_supported = 1 AND name_zh = #{nameZh}
